node_types.label: Diagnosis
node_types.description: A Diagnosis is a ClinicalFinding representing a clinician's assessment of a patient's condition or disease, qualified by its epistemic certainty to distinguish confirmed diagnoses from differentials, possibilities, or negations.

properties.name: certainty
properties.description: The epistemic certainty of a Diagnosis as stated or implied in the clinical text. Controlled values: confirmed, differential, possible, ruled_out, negated.

properties.name: diagnosisName
properties.description: The name of the diagnosed condition or disease as extracted from the clinical text (e.g., 'Ebstein anomaly', 'Crohn disease', 'hepatocellular carcinoma').

properties.name: snomedConceptId
properties.description: The SNOMED CT concept identifier (SCT ID) for this clinical entity, populated during extraction or post-mapping to support interoperability and SNOMED-based retrieval.

node_types.label: Encounter
node_types.description: An Encounter is an Event that represents a clinical contact between a patient and a healthcare setting, such as an initial presentation, admission, follow-up visit, or repeat procedure session.

properties.name: date
properties.description: The date on which an Encounter, Observation, or Procedure occurred. Stored as a string to accommodate partial dates (e.g., 'October 2004') and relative descriptions when absolute dates are unavailable.

node_types.label: Observation
node_types.description: An Observation is a ClinicalFinding that records a measured or assessed result obtained through laboratory analysis, physical examination, imaging, or pathology, including a result value and optional measurement unit.

properties.name: date
properties.description: The date on which an Encounter, Observation, or Procedure occurred. Stored as a string to accommodate partial dates (e.g., 'October 2004') and relative descriptions when absolute dates are unavailable.

properties.name: observationName
properties.description: The name of the test, examination, or measurement that produced the observation (e.g., 'haemoglobin', 'CT scan abdomen', 'ECG', 'leukocyte count').

properties.name: snomedConceptId
properties.description: The SNOMED CT concept identifier (SCT ID) for this clinical entity, populated during extraction or post-mapping to support interoperability and SNOMED-based retrieval.

properties.name: unit
properties.description: The unit of measurement for a numeric Observation result (e.g., 'g/dL', 'ng/mL', 'mm/hr', '×10⁹/L'). Empty for descriptive findings.

properties.name: value
properties.description: The result or finding value of an Observation, stored as a string to accommodate both numeric results (e.g., '13.1') and descriptive findings (e.g., 'Wolff-Parkinson-White pattern').

node_types.label: Patient
node_types.description: A Patient is a Party who is the subject of clinical care and documentation in a case sheet.

properties.name: age
properties.description: The age of the patient at the time of presentation, in years.

properties.name: sex
properties.description: The biological sex of the patient. Expected values: male, female, other.

node_types.label: Procedure
node_types.description: A Procedure is an Event representing a clinical action performed on or for a patient, including diagnostic procedures (biopsy, CT scan, ECG, echocardiography) and therapeutic interventions (ablation, lobectomy, TACE, surgery).

properties.name: date
properties.description: The date on which an Encounter, Observation, or Procedure occurred. Stored as a string to accommodate partial dates (e.g., 'October 2004') and relative descriptions when absolute dates are unavailable.

properties.name: procedureName
properties.description: The name of the clinical procedure or intervention as extracted from the case text (e.g., 'radiofrequency ablation', 'thoracoscopic lung biopsy', 'TACE').

properties.name: snomedConceptId
properties.description: The SNOMED CT concept identifier (SCT ID) for this clinical entity, populated during extraction or post-mapping to support interoperability and SNOMED-based retrieval.

node_types.label: Symptom
node_types.description: A Symptom is a ClinicalFinding representing a subjective complaint reported by the patient or a clinical sign observed during examination that may indicate disease.

properties.name: onset
properties.description: A textual description of the duration or onset pattern of a symptom, as stated in the case text (e.g., '6-week history', 'acute two-day history', 'occurred 2-3 times per week').

properties.name: snomedConceptId
properties.description: The SNOMED CT concept identifier (SCT ID) for this clinical entity, populated during extraction or post-mapping to support interoperability and SNOMED-based retrieval.

properties.name: symptomName
properties.description: The name of the symptom as extracted from the clinical text (e.g., 'palpitations', 'dyspnea', 'fever').

relationship_types.label: hasEncounter
relationship_types.description: Links a Patient to an Encounter in which that patient participated.

relationship_types.label: hasPatient
relationship_types.description: Links a ClinicalFinding, Procedure, or Encounter to the Patient it concerns.
